About_&_Key_Points:
About
Va Tech Wabag Ltd is engaged in the business of water treatment field. Its principal activities include design, supply, installation, construction and operational management of drinking water, waste water treatment, industrial water treatment and desalination plants.
[1]
Key Points
Solution Offerings:
[1]
[2]
The company offers sustainable water and environmental solutions, including desalination, wastewater treatment, water recycling and reuse, effluent treatment, drinking water systems, Zero Liquid Discharge (ZLD), sludge treatment, and energy recovery solutions. It executes projects through EPC, O&M, DBO, BOOT, and HAM models, catering to sectors such as municipal water and wastewater, oil & gas, power, steel, food & beverages, fertilizers, industrial parks, semiconductors, PV solar and green hydrogen.
